title: Things 2 Do — winter 2022 OSU finals stack + Twosday
html:
TL;DR

  • Course-by-course finals plan for winter 2022 at osu: ECON 201 (Chapter 15 smartbook + HW + quiz, Final 3/15), BA 161 (Time Mgmt + CEO Pitch), Study of Peace and Conflict (readings + discussion), Comm 218 (Final 3/11).
  • "Other" stack: crypto readings (the corvallis crypto club / 2022 01 30 going forward arc), get contacts/fix glasses, do FAFSA.
  • Household errand list: tide pods, Clorox wipes, face wipes, listerine.
  • Closing note: "Twosday on Tuesday (2/22/22). Happened in 1011, but will never happen again after today (at least in earth years). Wild!" — first instance in the corpus of Yahir noticing calendar palindromes as worth marking.

Key quote

"Twosday on Tuesday (2/22/22). Happened in 1011, but will never happen again after today (at least in earth years). Wild!"

Why it matters in the graph

  • A grid-cell of osu coursework — adjacent to the log and 2024 12 10 osu graduation's graduation-requirement audit two years later.
  • BA 161 "CEO Pitch" is the earliest mention of a pitch-as-coursework artifact — relevant when comparing his evolved pitching in 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide.
  • Study of Peace and Conflict is a -driven seed for the violence as only effective tool line that surfaces in 2022 03 11 one hundred years of solitude reading log.

Open questions

  • Did Yahir submit the BA 161 CEO Pitch? Worth searching raw/google-docs/ for the artifact.
  • Final grades from this term — anywhere captured?
